title: Bandagez
description: Bandages can be used to heal wounds and stop bleeding, making them a valuable tool for players who want to survive in the harsh world of Minecraft.
body:
# **Bandagez mod – Realistic Health & Bandages for Minecraft!**

Tired of healing instantly just by stuffing yourself with food? Want a more challenging and tactical survival experience? This mod is for you!

### **Key Features:**

✔ **No instant healing from food** – eating steak won’t save you anymore!  
✔ **Medical bandages** – basic, antiseptic, hemostatic, and more.  
✔ **Dangerous wounds** – **Bleeding** and **Hard Bleeding** will slowly kill you if left untreated.  
✔ **"Fresh Bandage" debuff** – hard bleeding needs time for heals.  
✔ **"Fracture" debuff** – be careful falling from a height and beware of explosions! Broken arms and legs will reduce your abilities.

### **Why You Should Try It?**

*   **Tactical survival** – no more mid-combat healing; prepare your medical supplies in advance!
*   **Variety of wounds & treatments** – different bandages for different situations.
*   **New challenges** – bleeding can be deadly if not stopped in time.
*   **Immersive gameplay** – gather resources, craft bandages, and manage your health carefully!

### **⚠ Important Notes:**

*   **Currently in development** – bugs may occur! Please report them to me.
*   **Suggestions & feedback are welcome!** Want a new feature or balance change? Let me know!
*   **Feel free to suggest MC versions to update and support!**

_(Compatibility with other mods may vary. Stay tuned for updates!)_

***

 

###### What next?

Next **tech** updates thoughts: debuf chance changes, timing changes, sound improvements, access to configure chances, damage and timings. Next _content_ updates: new items, new mechanics.
